calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Marie C. Flores was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Wally A. Fenete.
Default was entered against defendant on September 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 29, 2009.

Exhibit--1--Nordstrom Account Summary dated November 13, 2008-------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--2--Canceled Checks-----------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--3--Canceled Checks-----------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--4-Nordstrom Account Summary dated December 13, 2008-------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--5--Nordstrom Account Summary dated February 13, 2009-------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--6--Account Statement, undated------------------------------------------------ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Marie C. Flores, and against the Defaulted Defendant Wally A. Fenete as follows:

Damages/Principal - $7,939.87.
Prejudgment Interest - Reserved.
Costs - $445.00.

Total - $8,384.87.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Continued To Feb-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
